summary: Metaflows execution phase 1 complete. All three parallel flows (audit recovery, state coherence, performance hardening) have generated actionable findings.

audit_recovery.findings: All auditable state corruption detectors passing. No deadlock cycles detected. All concurrent operation sequences valid.

state_coherence.findings: 100% coherence validation score. All state transition rules satisfied. No state regressions vs baseline.

performance_hardening.findings: orient p95 latency 153ms over SLO. Two optimization strategies proposed: cache layer (medium effort, 25-50% improvement) and investigate recent changes (low effort, 23% improvement).

next_phase_recommendations: Review and prioritize cache-layer implementation (medium effort, high impact)
Profile recent changes to orient command for regression analysis
Consider parallel execution of non-blocking state checks
Execute Phase 2 optimizations and measure impact against P95 SLO
